name: @chinmaymk/ra
description: One loop. Infinite agents. Core runtime for the ra AI agent framework.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @anthropic-ai/sdk --external openai --external @google/generative-ai --external ollama --external @aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime --external @azure/openai --external @azure/identity && bun tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
